name: White Chocolate Macadamia Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Line a 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan with foil, including the sides, and lightly grease.
3. Melt butter and white chocolate in microwave or double boiler over low heat until smooth. Stir often.
4. Remove from heat and stir in sugar and vanilla extract.
5. Beat eggs lightly and add to chocolate mixture. Stir well.
6. Add flour and macadamia nuts and stir just to combine.
7. Transfer batter to pan and bake 30 - 35 minutes or until pale golden.
8. Cool completely, then remove from pan and cut into squares.
Yield: 24 - 32 squares.
